message:
feat(tui): Add interactive skill browser TUI (ms browse)

Implements meta_skill-eyuz: Build interactive skill browser TUI

Features:
- Two-pane layout: skill list (40%) + detail preview (60%)
- Fuzzy search with '/' key to filter skills
- j/k navigation with wrap-around
- Tab to switch focus between panels
- Enter/l to load selected skill
- Filter syntax: layer:base, tag:rust, quality:>0.8
- Help overlay with '?' key
- Quality score coloring (green/yellow/red)
- Layer-colored skill entries
- Graceful error when not in interactive terminal

Files:
- src/tui/browse.rs: TUI application with BrowseTui struct
- src/cli/commands/browse.rs: CLI command integration
- Updates to mod.rs files for exports and command dispatch

Unit tests cover:
- Filter by search query
- Filter by layer
- Filter by tag
- Filter by quality
- Combined filters
- Navigation wrapping
- Focus toggling
- Helper functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
